form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 15th of 19 at this track on January 31 over 1200m, 6 len behind Whirlwind carrying 61.5kg at $34. Second-up 6th of 9 at Durbanville on March 4 over 1400m, 4 len behind King's Quest carrying 56.5kg at $15. Strong winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5). Third-up today. Resuming 15th of 19 at this track on January 31 over 1200m, 6 len behind Whirlwind carrying 61.5kg at $34. Second-up 6th of 9 at Durbanville on March 4 over 1400m, 4 len behind King's Quest carrying 56.5kg at $15. Strong winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made contact with Greenlight Jet leaving the stalls.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 54 day let-up. Last start won by 0.5 len at Durbanville February 11 over 1800m defeating Chance Encounter with 58.5kg at $4.30. The start before that 4th of 10 at this track on January 13 over 1800m, 1.75 len behind Twilight Warrior with 58.5kg at $9. Impressive win last start and is in the mix again.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign second of 13 at this track January 31 over 2000m, 3 len behind Note To Self with 57kg at $26. When resuming last campaign sixth of 10 at this track November 22 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Ireland Forever with 56kg at $17. Cannot enthuse.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign second of 13 at this track January 31 over 2000m, 3 len behind Note To Self with 57kg at $26. When resuming last campaign sixth of 10 at this track November 22 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Ireland Forever with 56kg at $17. Cannot enthuse.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide without cover in the early middle stages.
Raced wide without cover on the turn and into the straight.
Stumbled leaving the stalls.
At the 350m, carried outwards by Green Garnet.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 54-day let-up. Last start 2nd of 8 at Durbanville on February 11 over 1800m, 0.5 len behind Noble Hero carrying 57kg at $2.70. Before that 6th of 12 at this track on January 4 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Foudre with 54kg at $15. Doesn?t need to improve much to salute.

Before that 6th of 12 at this track on January 4 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Foudre with 54kg at $15. Doesn?t need to improve much to salute.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the 600m, racing in front, caused Perfect Impact to steady off heels.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 51-day let-up. Most recently favourite; won by a neck at Durbanville February 14 over 1600m defeating Ready For The Road with 61.5kg at $2.80. The run before that 2nd of 11 at Durbanville on January 21 over 1600m, long-neck behind Prairie Dawn carrying 59kg at $5.50. Can go on with the job.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(12.5). Form hard to fault. Returns from a 51-day let-up. Most recently favourite; won by a neck at Durbanville February 14 over 1600m defeating Ready For The Road with 61.5kg at $2.80. The run before that 2nd of 11 at Durbanville on January 21 over 1600m, long-neck behind Prairie Dawn carrying 59kg at $5.50. Can go on with the job.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped outwards and shortly after the start, squeezed Sixtyzero.
Brushed Sky Pilot in the latter stages.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes here off a 37-day let-up. Last start ran last in a small field at this track in LR on February 28 over 2500m, 5 len behind Tenpenny carrying 54kg at $4. The start before that 3rd of 13 at this track on January 31 over 2000m, 4 len behind Note To Self with 57kg at $4. Best form should see him measure right up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). Racing well recently. Comes here off a 37-day let-up. Last start ran last in a small field at this track in LR on February 28 over 2500m, 5 len behind Tenpenny carrying 54kg at $4. The start before that 3rd of 13 at this track on January 31 over 2000m, 4 len behind Note To Self with 57kg at $4. Best form should see him measure right up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Brushed Gentleman Joe at the 300m.
Slow into stride.
Slow into stride.
Approaching the 100m, shifted in away from the crop and had to be straightened.
Jumped slow, losing one length.
Jumped slow, losing one length. Raced green.
Jumped slow, losing two lengths.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resumes off a 37 day letup. First-up 6th of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Bonelli carrying 61.5kg at $11. Second-up won by 2 len at this track February 28 over 1800m defeating Spanish Verse carrying 60kg at $15. Broke through last time and is worth thought again.

Second-up won by 2 len at this track February 28 over 1800m defeating Spanish Verse carrying 60kg at $15. Broke through last time and is worth thought again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Brushed Oh So Onederful at the 50m.
Shortly after the start, carried inwards by Afrique.
Made contacted leaving the stalls.

form.formComment: Returns from a 54-day let-up. Most recently 4th of 8 at Durbanville on February 11 over 1800m, 4 len behind Noble Hero with 55.5kg at $13.50. The race before that won by a nose at this track January 13 over 1800m defeating Wehaveasituation with 54kg at $13.50. Better off looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: App S Bungane dropped his crop at the 250m.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign ninth of 15 at this track January 31 over 1600m, 7 len behind Foudre carrying 55.5kg at $11. When resuming last campaign fourth of 11 at Durbanville August 27 over 1250m, 6 len behind Viva's Liberte with 56.5kg at $5.50. Will struggle against these.
